description: A morphing shape that cycles through rounded corners—starting as sharp squares, progressively bulging into pills, then pinching back to sharp—while its drop shadow intensifies and softens in sync with each border-radius phase, creating a breathing pulse effect.

Five staggered vertical bars that sequentially stroke-dash along their SVG paths while their stroke color shifts from cool blue through purple to hot pink, with each bar's color transition offset by 200ms to create a rolling rainbow wave.

A clipped circular mask that shrinks and expands concentrically while rotating, revealing and concealing layers of a background gradient that shifts position beneath it, synchronized so the clip-path timing creates a pulsing spotlight effect.

Three nested boxes that skew on the X-axis in opposite directions while their sizes grow and shrink inversely—the outer box expands as the inner shrinks—and their shadows cast at different angles to exaggerate the perspective distortion across four sequential phases.

A radial burst where six geometric petals scale outward from center while simultaneously rotating clockwise, each petal's stroke width pulsing (size), stroke color shifting through a gradient spectrum, and a central shadow expanding then contracting to create concentric rings of depth that accelerate then decelerate across the animation.

A text path where individual characters clip-reveal along a curved SVG trajectory while the background behind them shifts position diagonally, the clip region's border-radius morphs from sharp corners to fully rounded and back, and the shadow beneath the text grows darker then lighter in sync with the border-radius phases to enhance the dimensional reveal effect.

Four concentric circles where the outermost skews on alternating axes while the inner circles counter-skew, their strokes dash-animate in opposite directions at different speeds, and each circle's size oscillates inversely—large strokes thin as inner circles expand—creating a twisting, breathing vortex with staggered timing between each ring.

A particle rain effect where drops translate downward at varying speeds while their opacity fades in and out, individual drops' border-radius shifts from sharp to fully rounded mid-fall, shadows stretch and compress vertically beneath them, and color transitions from cool cyan through warm amber, with each drop's timing offset to create a cascading, flickering waterfall of staggered motion phases.

A comet streaking across the screen that translates diagonally while its trailing tail's stroke-dasharray animates backward, the tail's stroke-width fattens then thins in three phases, the comet head's shadow stretches and compresses, and the tail's color gradient shifts from white through amber to fade, all orchestrated so the dash animation lags behind the head's movement by 150ms.

A liquid blob that morphs through four distinct shapes while its border-radius cycles from 20% to 60% to 40%, its stroke animates as a chasing dashed outline that reverses direction every half-cycle, stroke color transitions from teal to magenta, and an inner shadow inverts intensity in sync with each shape transition.

A bouncing ball that scales vertically while squashing (reducing height, increasing width) on impact, the impact zone clips a burst radius that shrinks and expands, the ball's shadow stretches horizontally beneath it during flight then compresses on landing, and a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses to accentuate each bounce in a six-phase sequence.

An origami fold sequence where two triangular flaps skew inward from opposite sides while their stroke-dasharray reveals crease lines that animate in staggered phases, the fold depth intensifies through color shifts from white to deep gray, and a shadow beneath the fold grows darker then lighter as the fold tightens then releases.

A segmented loading spinner with eight arcs where each arc's stroke-dasharray chases around its perimeter at staggered 80ms intervals, stroke color ripples through a gradient from indigo to cyan, the arc's stroke-width scales in response to rotation angle, and a central shadow pulses to indicate processing intensity.

A paper plane that translates upward along a curved path while rotating on three axes, its fuselage stroke-dasharray animates as if wind is peeling the outline, the plane's clip-path narrows and widens to simulate banking turns, and the shadow beneath stretches at sharp angles then compresses, all timed across a five-phase flight sequence.

Matrix-style falling glyphs that translate downward in staggered columns, each glyph's stroke animates as a glowing outline that brightens then dims, the glyph color shifts from bright green through muted tones, border-radius morphs from sharp to slightly rounded to suggest digital decay, and background-position scrolls vertically beneath to create depth parallax.

Interlocking gears where the primary gear rotates clockwise while three secondary gears counter-rotate, each gear's stroke-width modulates inversely with rotation speed, stroke color cycles through complementary pairs, and skewed perspective shadows beneath each gear shift angle to exaggerate the mechanical interlocking motion across four staggered startup phases.

A morphing star that transforms from sharp points to rounded lobes by cycling border-radius, the stroke animates as a gradient that flows around the perimeter in a three-second loop, stroke color shifts from gold through silver, the shadow beneath intensifies as border-radius increases (rounder = darker), and the entire shape scales in and out of the stroke width modulation.

A spiral that expands outward while rotating, its svg stroke-dasharray animates to chase the rotation, the dash pattern accelerates then decelerates creating a breathing rhythm, stroke color gradually shifts from cool blue to warm orange, the shadow radiates and contracts concentrically, and the center clips a rotating mask that obscures and reveals the spiral's core in six staggered cycles.

A pulsing DNA helix where two intertwined curves skew and counter-skew on alternating axes, each strand's stroke-width oscillates inversely (one fattens as the other thins), stroke-dasharray chases in opposite directions at different speeds, color gradients flow through complementary spectrums, and shadows cast at opposing angles to amplify the helical depth across eight staggered timing phases.

A radiant sun where central rays rotate while their stroke-width scales rhythmically, the rays' stroke color transitions from yellow through orange to red in a three-phase heating sequence, a surrounding halo's border-radius morphs from sharp to completely rounded and back, and the outer glow's shadow intensifies as the animation peaks, all with staggered timing for each ray group.

A water droplet that falls and bounces, its clip-path shifts from teardrop to sphere on impact, the droplet's stroke animates as a surface tension line that moves across its surface, stroke color fades from saturated blue to pale, the shadow beneath stretches horizontally on landing then snaps back, and the background-position shifts upward to simulate water reflection parallax.

Interlocking rings that rotate at different speeds while their border-radius cycles between sharp and fully rounded, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in staggered 100ms offsets, stroke color ripples through a color gradient sequence, and inner shadows alternate between sharp and soft focus in sync with the border-radius morphing to suggest ring thickness variation.

A kaleidoscope pattern where twelve triangular wedges rotate clockwise while skewing on alternating axes, each wedge's stroke-width pulsates to the beat, stroke color sequences through a rainbow gradient in staggered phases (offset by 30ms per wedge), the center clips a rotating mask with morphing border-radius, and layered shadows cast at varying opacity to create depth.

A pulsating membrane that cycles border-radius from 10% (sharp) to 50% (bulbous) while its stroke-dasharray animates as a chasing wave, the wave acceleration creates a four-phase rhythm (slow-fast-slow-medium), stroke color shifts from pale to vibrant and back, and the membrane's shadow inverts (cast outward then inward) to suggest expansion and contraction.

A geometric tessellation where six hexagons translate inward toward center in staggered sequence, each hexagon's stroke-width scales as it approaches center (fattening on arrival), stroke color builds from muted to saturated as shapes converge, border-radius subtly morphs to create bulging effects, and overlapping shadows darken to suggest layering depth.

A whirlwind effect where particles scale outward from center while rotating rapidly, each particle's stroke animates with a dash pattern that spirals outward, stroke color gradient flows from cool center to warm edges in staggered ripples, the particle's shadow stretches radially and contracts, and opacity fades from opaque core to transparent periphery across the expanding arc.

A folding envelope where the top flap skews downward while its stroke-dasharray animates to trace a crease line, the flap's stroke color shifts from white to gray as it closes, the back panel's shadow grows darker beneath the flap, the envelope's border-radius subtly rounds corners on open then sharpens on close, and the background-position shifts to simulate paper texture translation.

A rotating aperture where concentric rings scale outward while counter-rotating, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposite directions, stroke color sequences through complementary gradients in staggered phases, inner shadows alternate between sharp and diffuse, and the central clip-path shrinks then expands to create a pulsing iris effect across six nested ring layers.

A cascading ribbon that translates diagonally downward while its stroke-width modulates to create a rippling wave, the wave accelerates then decelerates across four phases, stroke-dasharray chases the ribbon length, stroke color fades from opaque magenta to transparent, the ribbon's shadow stretches perpendicular to motion, and skew distortion warps the ribbon's perspective at peak velocity.

A throb effect where a central shape scales up and down while its border-radius morphs from sharp to completely rounded and back in sync with scale expansion, the shape's stroke-width pulses inversely to scale (thin on expand, thick on contract), stroke color brightens on expansion then darkens on contraction, and the outer glow's shadow grows and shrinks to emphasize the breathing rhythm.

A branching tree where limbs translate outward from a central trunk while rotating, each limb's stroke-dasharray animates to suggest growth, stroke color builds from brown base to green tips in staggered phases, the limb's stroke-width scales with growth progression, and shadow angles shift to suggest directional light as limbs extend, with clip-path masking to reveal leaves at branch tips.

A morphing blob swarm where eight blobs cluster then scatter while each blob's border-radius cycles independently, the cluster's combined stroke-width creates a boundary that animates as the group shape changes, stroke color ripples through a gradient as blobs reposition, shadows beneath blobs darken when clustered then lighten when scattered, and staggered timing creates a wave-like separation effect.

An expanding mandala where twelve petals scale outward and rotate while their stroke-dasharray animates inward to suggest contraction against expansion, the stroke color gradient flows from center warmth to peripheral coolness in repeating cycles, each petal's border-radius softens at peak extension, layered shadows cast inward then outward, and the background-position scrolls behind in counter-rotation to create a mesmerizing mandala depth effect.

A falling confetti stream where individual pieces translate downward at staggered speeds while their border-radius morphs from sharp corners to fully rounded mid-fall, rotating on multiple axes simultaneously, with shadow stretch-and-compress beneath each piece and opacity fading from opaque to transparent, creating a cascading, dimensional flutter effect.

A morphing hexagon that transforms through six phases while its border-radius cycles between sharp (0%) and bulbous (40%), simultaneously rotating 360 degrees, the stroke animates as a color gradient that flows around the perimeter, and an inner shadow inverts intensity at each phase transition to suggest dimensional depth.

A wave of falling dominoes where each block translates downward in staggered sequence while skewing forward on impact, the block's border-radius subtly rounds on collision, the stroke-width fattens at contact point, and the shadow beneath stretches horizontally then snaps back, creating a cascading topple effect.
